message:
feat(models): add canonical provider preference and per-model reasoning detection

Two improvements to model registry resolution:

1. find_by_id() canonical provider preference: When multiple providers
   carry the same model ID (e.g., Claude via anthropic + bedrock),
   prefer the canonical/primary provider.  Canonical mappings:
   claude* → anthropic, gpt-*/o1/o3/o4 → openai, gemini* → google,
   command* → cohere, mistral*/codestral* → mistral, deepseek* → deepseek.
   Tie-break alphabetically for determinism.

2. Per-model reasoning flag detection: New model_is_reasoning() function
   that overrides provider-level reasoning defaults for known model ID
   patterns — prevents non-reasoning models like gpt-4o from inheriting
   a provider-level reasoning:true flag (Issue #19).  Applied in
   append_upstream_nonlegacy_models(), built_in_models(),
   apply_custom_models(), and dynamic model construction.

Also improves test panic messages with format context for provider
alias tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
